fields.label: Reward & Incentive Method
fields.description: How to allocate Reward and Incentive amounts when a Sales Invoice is submitted. Quotation Wise = proportional to invoice value vs quote total. Item Wise = per Quotation Item using qty proportion.

fields.label: Company Account Mapping
fields.description: Liability and expense accounts per company used when posting the Reward / Incentive Journal Entry on Sales Invoice submit.

fields.label: Quotation High-Probability Workflow
fields.description: Roles that drive the High-Probability Quotation lock + RBAC + dual-approval workflow. Sridhar 2026-05-06 spec.

fields.label: Quote Action Request — Level 1 Approver
fields.description: Role allowed to perform the L1 Approve transition on a Quotation Action Request. Cannot self-approve.

fields.label: Quote Action Request — Level 2 Approver
fields.description: Role allowed to perform the L2 Approve transition. Cannot self-approve. L2 approval triggers automatic execution of the requested Cancel / Amend / Resubmit action.

fields.label: Quotation Team Role
fields.description: Role that owns Quotations and creates Action Requests. Members are also auto-whitelisted for the High-Probability lock.

fields.label: Restricted Roles (Read-only on Approved+100)
fields.description: Roles whose users see only Quotations where workflow_state='Approved' AND probability=100. Typically downstream teams: Dispatch, Procurement, Supply Chain, Logistics.
